title: Compose Development, Overrides, Profiles, Watch, and Test Workflows · Container-System Defense
summary: A release board compares fresh compose development, overrides, profiles, watch, and test workflows decisions and accepts only answers tied to observable image, container, build, or Compose evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for development and test Compose workflow matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.
Use profiles and explicit service targeting for optional tools without silently omitting required dependencies.
Choose sync, rebuild, restart, sync-and-restart, initial sync, and ignore behavior from code, dependency, config, and platform changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Compose Files Merge Reset
steps.instruction:
Order the Docker Compose Files Merge Reset container delivery evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Compose Files Merge Reset.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Docker Compose Files Merge Reset assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Compose Files Merge Reset, keep Docker Compose Files Merge Reset connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.

content.text: A quiz override bind-mounts production paths, watch rebuilds on generated files, and dev and test profiles silently change dependencies. Render every file combination and isolate disposable state. Competency probe: Merge base, development, test, and local Compose files while predicting mapping, sequence, reset, replace, and path resolution behavior.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use config, profiles, images, models, variables, consistency checks, dry-run, and changed-file review before mutating a stack.
